## Impact / blast radius

- [ ] Touches `apps/web` (Next.js — dashboard app)
- [ ] Touches `infra/` (compose, nginx, scripts)
- [ ] Touches `docker-compose.yml` (service topology)
- [ ] Adds or rotates secrets (must be documented in `docs/RUNBOOK.md`)
- [ ] Requires a database migration
- [ ] Requires a one-shot operation on the server (rebuild image, run script, …)
